name: storage-management
description: Manage storage devices and resources in Proxmox. Monitor storage usage, allocate resources, and plan storage expansion for your virtualization infrastructure.
capabilities: List all storage devices in Proxmox cluster
Get storage capacity and utilization details
Track storage allocation for VMs and containers
Identify storage bottlenecks and performance issues
author: DataKnifeAI
securitySummary: All 26 static findings are FALSE POSITIVEs. The files contain only documentation and metadata with no executable code. 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' flags were triggered by JSON hash values, version numbers, and numeric identifiers. 'Command execution' flags were triggered by markdown backticks used for tool name formatting (e.g., `get_storage`). 'Network' and 'filesystem' flags were triggered by GitHub source URLs in metadata. This is documentation-only content for a Proxmox storage management skill.
valueStatement: Proxmox storage management is complex and time-consuming. This skill provides AI-powered tools to monitor, analyze, and optimize your storage infrastructure effortlessly.
limitations: Requires Proxmox VE MCP server installation
Only works with Proxmox Virtual Environment
Actual implementation depends on MCP server codebase
Limited to storage operations exposed by Proxmox API

useCases.title: Storage Capacity Planning
useCases.description: Analyze storage usage trends and plan expansion before reaching capacity limits

useCases.title: Storage Performance Monitoring
useCases.description: Monitor storage health and identify bottlenecks affecting VM performance

useCases.title: Storage Resource Optimization
useCases.description: Rebalance storage allocation and optimize resource utilization across the cluster

promptTemplates.title: Storage Overview
promptTemplates.prompt: Show me all storage devices in my Proxmox cluster with their capacity and current usage

promptTemplates.title: Capacity Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze storage usage across all nodes and identify which devices need expansion in the next 3 months

promptTemplates.title: Performance Troubleshooting
promptTemplates.prompt: Check storage performance metrics and identify any bottlenecks that might be affecting VM performance

promptTemplates.title: Detailed Node Storage
promptTemplates.prompt: Get detailed storage information for node 'proxmox-node-1' including usage, allocation, and performance data

bestPractices: Monitor storage capacity weekly to avoid unexpected full disks
Maintain at least 20% free space on all storage devices for optimal performance
Use different storage tiers for different workload types like SSD for VMs and HDD for backups
antiPatterns: Ignoring storage alerts until disks are completely full
Storing VM disks and backups on the same storage device
Not planning storage expansion until reaching 95% capacity

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with all Proxmox versions?
faq.answer: The skill works with Proxmox VE 6.0 and later versions that support the API endpoints used by the MCP server.

faq.question: What are the storage monitoring limits?
faq.answer: Limits depend on your Proxmox cluster size. The skill can monitor unlimited nodes and storage devices within a single cluster.

faq.question: How does this integrate with existing monitoring tools?
faq.answer: The skill complements existing tools by providing AI-powered analysis and natural language queries for storage management tasks.

faq.question: Is my storage data safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill only reads storage information through Proxmox API. It cannot modify or delete any storage data.

faq.question: The skill is not showing my storage devices. What is wrong?
faq.answer: Ensure your Proxmox VE MCP server is running and properly configured with API credentials for your cluster.

faq.question: How does this compare to Proxmox built-in storage management?
faq.answer: This skill provides AI-powered insights and natural language interface while using Proxmox native APIs under the hood.
